title: Outdoor Thermal Mat Heat Reflective Sleeping Pad Insulated Winter Chill
description:
The ASR Outdoor Reflective Thermal Camping Mat will keep you warm in those cold winter nights while camping out in the wilderness. You never know when a little extra heat will come in handy and this camping sleeping pad offers an added barrier between you and the hard ground that will help retain warmth with additional comfort packed into the .25 inches of closed cell EVA foam; don't leave home without it, be prepared at all times While the main advantage to the insulated foam camping sleeping pad is the added Mylar covering which helps retain heat and disburses it evenly throughout the camping pad back to your body as you lay at rest

Outdoor Thermal Mat Heat Reflective Sleeping Pad Insulated Winter Chill

The ASR Outdoor Reflective Thermal Camping Mat will keep you warm in those cold winter nights while camping out in the wilderness. You never know when a little extra heat will come in handy and this camping sleeping pad offers an added barrier between you and the hard ground that will help retain warmth with additional comfort packed into the .25 inches of closed cell EVA foam; don't leave home without it, be prepared at all times

Key Features

  • INSULATED FOAM SLEEPING PAD - Made with EVA foam for comfort and a special thermal reflective layer to keep you warm. Use in combination with a fleece sleeping bag liner for best heat retention on cold winter nights
  • DURABLE - Made to withstand extended outdoor use. EVA closed cell foam is resistant to dust, moisture, UV rays, heat, chemicals, and oils
  • ULTRA LIGHTWEIGHT - Weighing only 8 oz, and made of thin .25 inch foam, this pad is ideal for packing light while camping or hiking. The mat measures 71 inches long x 20 inches wide when unrolled. Rolled up, it is 20 inches by 5.5 inches
  • VERSATILE - Can be used as a sleeping pad or seat cover. It can be used on flat ground, or over rocks, or a log giving you a space to sit or sleep no matter where you are. Easily unrolls in seconds. You'll love using this whether at home or on the go
  • PORTABLE - Included adjustable elastic straps and buckles are forgiving and simple to use. The stretchy elastic bands easily wrap around the mat meaning you don't need to worry about rolling up tightly. Attach to your backpack to save space

Product Specifications

  • MPN: EB7158
  • UPC: 706569705614
  • Size: Single
  • Color: Yellow

While the main advantage to the insulated foam camping sleeping pad is the added Mylar covering which helps retain heat and disburses it evenly throughout the camping pad back to your body as you lay at rest. This foam sleeping pad also has two adjustable elastic straps which allows the unit to be self contained and easily transportable, stow-able, and readily available when needed.

Un-rolled dimensions of the sleeping pad is 71 x 20 x 0.25 inches. Making it the ideal size for a single person sleeping pad. Rolled up the cushioned camping mat is only 20 x 5.5 inches and features 2 attached elastic straps which make packing up a breeze.

This sleeping pad should be kept in your gear whether you're hiking, camping, hunting, fishing or any other outdoor activity or adventure!
